Notice Of Motion For Order: Truth Of Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Jul-22-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NA's Motion For Order: Truth Of Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard on the court's discovery calendar (room 301) on the same date at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/CK)

Notice Of Motion For Order: Truth Of Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Jul-22-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Claudia Estrada, Esq. (559.418.0333) of Quall Cardot LLP for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Not contested/argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'s MOTION FOR ORDER: TRUTH OF MATTERS SPECIFIED IN REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED is granted. The RFAs will be deemed admitted unless responses are provided at or before the hearing.

order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: A. Datt, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
